message.content:
No projeto em `c:\Users\charl\OneDrive\Área de Trabalho\WA\Easy\easy-salon-monorepo\frontend\src`, encontre todos os arquivos que usam Alert, AlertTitle, AlertDescription, ou qualquer padrão de alerta/notificação inline. Procure por:
1. Imports de `@/components/ui/alert`
2. Imports de qualquer outro Alert (ex: AlertDialog, shadcn Alert, etc.)
3. Divs com classes de alerta hardcoded (bg-red-*, bg-yellow-*, bg-green-*, bg-blue-*) que pareçam ser alertas visuais
4. Qualquer uso de `role="alert"`

Para cada arquivo encontrado, mostre o trecho de código relevante com contexto (5 linhas antes e depois). Liste o caminho completo de cada arquivo.

1→import * as React from "react"
     2→import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority"
     3→import { X } from "lucide-react"
     4→
     5→import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
     6→
     7→const alertVariants = cva(
     8→  "relative w-full rounded-[16px] border p-4 [&>svg~*]:pl-7 [&>svg+div]:translate-y-[-3px] [&>svg]:absolute [&>svg]:left-4 [&>svg]:top-4 [&>svg]:text-foreground [&>svg]:h-4 [&>svg]:w-4",
     9→  {
    10→    variants: {
    11→      variant: {
    12→        default: "bg-card text-foreground",
    13→        destructive:
    14→          "border-[#CE4836]/50 text-[#CE4836] bg-[#FFF4F4] [&>svg]:text-[#CE4836]",
    15→        success:
    16→          "border-[#7DBA44]/50 text-[#49870E] bg-[#F2FBE8] [&>svg]:text-[#49870E]",
    17→        warning:
    18→          "border-[#EBB33A]/50 text-[#C28604] bg-[#FEF6E4] [&>svg]:text-[#C28604]",
    19→        info:
    20→          "border-[#007AFF]/50 text-[#1166C3] bg-[#F1F4FF] [&>svg]:text-[#1166C3]",
    21→      },
    22→    },
    23→    defaultVariants: {
    24→      variant: "default",
    25→    },
    26→  }
    27→)
    28→
    29→const Alert = React.forwardRef<
    30→  HTMLDivElement,
    31→  React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> & VariantProps<typeof alertVariants>
    32→>(({ className, variant, ...props }, ref) => (
    33→  <div
    34→    ref={ref}
    35→    role="alert"
    36→    className={cn(alertVariants({ variant }), className)}
    37→    {...props}
    38→  />
    39→))
    40→Alert.displayName = "Alert"
    41→
    42→const AlertTitle = React.forwardRef<
    43→  HTMLParagraphElement,

    45→>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
    46→  <h5
    47→    ref={ref}
    48→    className={cn("mb-1 text-[13px] font-medium leading-none tracking-tight", className)}
    49→    {...props}
    50→  />
    51→))
    52→AlertTitle.displayName = "AlertTitle"
    53→
    54→const AlertDescription = React.forwardRef<
    55→  HTMLParagraphElement,
    56→  React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLParagraphElement>
    57→>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
    58→  <div
    59→    ref={ref}
    60→    className={cn("text-[12px] [&_p]:leading-relaxed", className)}
    61→    {...props}
    62→  />
    63→))
    64→AlertDescription.displayName = "AlertDescription"
    65→
    66→const AlertClose = React.forwardRef<
    67→  HTMLButtonElement,
    68→  React.ButtonHTMLAttributes<HTMLButtonElement>
    69→>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
    70→  <button
    71→    ref={ref}
    72→    className={cn(
    73→      "absolute right-3 top-3 p-0.5 rounded-sm opacity-60 hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring",
    74→      className
    75→    )}
    76→    {...props}
    77→  >

    80→))
    81→AlertClose.displayName = "AlertClose"
    82→
